metadata.description: Skill-form AI products built around mental models — by Stefan (胖总).

plugins.name: pz-skills
plugins.description: All skills in this repo. Currently includes xuexiqu (Vygotsky ZPD-based learning coach), kanjianzj (metacognition + affect labeling + triune brain emotional companion), and jinzita (Pyramid Principle + MECE + SCQA structured-expression coach).
